title: Audio statement: pledge of allegiance to al-Qaeda (al-Zawahiri); rejection of ISIS merger
dateStatus: Needs review — event and publication dates both recorded as 2013-04-10 in candidate file; not independently verified in this research pass
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Contemporary public name at the time of this record: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani. The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
evidenceSummary: An audio statement attributed to Abu Muhammad al-Jolani, leader of Jabhat al-Nusra, recorded in the candidate file with dates of 10 April 2013. The statement addresses a pledge of allegiance (bay'a) to al-Qaeda and its leader Ayman al-Zawahiri, and a rejection of Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi's announcement that Jabhat al-Nusra had merged into the Islamic State in Iraq and al-Sham (ISIS). The date, recording, and distribution channel have not been confirmed through primary source verification. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass (which covered S2015-005 only).
publicResearchNote: This audio statement is retained as a Phase 1 corpus candidate because it is the first known attributed public statement by al-Jolani on the questions addressed in the recording. The primary audio source, distribution channel, and date all require verification. No transcript has been located. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass.
